docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-16-2013

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JOSE $6,172.28 PRINCIPAL, $703.28 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,165.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
